# FerrisWheel

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FerrisWheel;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FerrisWheel { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

big wheel, daisy wheel, observation, attraction, entertainment, amusement park, theme park, funfair
